title: looshy [RED OVERLAY]
description: An overlay of the diamond textures for looshy's 1.21 pack. Please install looshy's base 1.21 pack.
body:
An overlay of the diamond textures, explosion particles, and some GUI for looshy's 1.21 pack. Please install looshy's base 1.21 pack as that contains the original textures. Using this on any other version than 1.21.4 may not work.

Link to looshy's pack: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/looshy

**[PLEASE INSTALL LOOSHY'S PACK FOR BLOCK, PARTICLE, OR OTHER TEXTURES]**

All credit goes to looshy. This is only an **overlay**.

~Steps~
1. Install the pack.
2. To use the red overlay, drag it above the original looshy texture pack on the right side of the resource pack menu.
3. To not use the red overlay, simply drag the original looshy pack above the red overlay, or remove it from the right hand side and back to the left side with the list of texture packs. 

Note: I will eventually make the overlay compatible with 1.21.11 or other versions that change file locations.
